## Purpose

Describe the user-visible or architectural change.

## Measurement provenance

For telemetry changes, identify the source, unit, normalization, unavailable behavior, and representative hardware.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] `./scripts/validate-source.sh`
- [ ] Xcode tests
- [ ] Apple Silicon validation, when relevant
- [ ] Intel/AMD or Hackintosh validation, when relevant
- [ ] silent startup preserved
- [ ] unavailable values are not fabricated
- [ ] reduced motion and light/dark mode considered
- [ ] documentation updated

## Evidence

Attach concise logs, screenshots, or before/after measurements. Remove serial numbers, user names, paths, and network identifiers.
